sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5837" key="a)mfiqa/lamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιθάλᾰμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου,</itype> prob. <sense id="n5837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀντι-</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corresponding chamber,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
